title: Authorize {client}
subtitle: wants to access your planner
capCalendar: View and edit your calendar events
capSleep: View your sleep log and summaries
grantNote: Access is granted as you, within your own permissions. You can revoke it any time in Supabase.

states.unavailableBody: The Claude connector isn't enabled for this workspace.
states.missingBody: Open this page from the connect flow in Claude. There's nothing to authorize directly.
states.expiredBody: Authorization requests are valid for only a few minutes and can be used once. Start the connection again from Claude to get a fresh one.
states.notAllowedBody: {client} ({uri}) isn't on the allowed list, so it can't connect to this planner.
